failedAssertions.reason: Fallback/failover is a proxy-layer feature (internal/proxy/handler.go). No tests exist for routing chains with fallback on 5xx errors. The registry supports backend resolution, but failover logic is untested.
No-fallback on 4xx is a proxy-layer feature. No tests verify that 4xx errors from Copilot backend do not trigger fallback to another backend.
Per-client backend key overrides for non-Copilot backends is a proxy-layer feature. No tests confirm overrides work while Copilot is registered alongside.
Stats recording for Copilot backend happens in proxy handler layer (internal/proxy/handler.go). No proxy-layer tests exist to verify stats entries.
Stats recording for streaming Copilot requests happens in proxy handler layer. No proxy-layer tests exist.

appliedUpdates.description: Added environment observations: gh auth token lacks Copilot scopes (404 on /copilot_internal/v2/token), proxy config flag is -config, test config created at config-test-oauth.yaml
Added Flow Validator Guidance for API Surface with isolation rules, boundaries, and tool setup
